creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
Joseph S. Atkinson wrote:
> I need more information on this, please invoke:
>
> $ pkg_info -W /usr/local/include/proxy.h
>
> I need to know what port is installing this.
>

I have no idea what pulled that in, seems it's not required by anything 
and after removing it, fixes the build.

If you need any more info, feel free to ask.

~>pkg_info -W /usr/local/include/proxy.h
/usr/local/include/proxy.h was installed by package libmonetra-7.0.2


~>pkg_info -rR libmonetra-7.0.2
Information for libmonetra-7.0.2:

Depends on:

This PR can be closed if maintainer agrees.


-- 
Over the years I've come to regard you as people I've met.
